metadata.title: Guest House | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered guest house management platform for all your hospitality operations — from online booking management and room planning to invoicing and guest services.

hero.title: Guest House
hero.description: Capture attention with a stunning website, accept online bookings, manage availability, and take care of your guests from check-in to check-out with AdonERP.
hero.testimonialQuote: AdonERP helped us achieve our goals while expanding, reducing costs and improving productivity, invoicing, and decision-making thanks to data availability.

cards.builder: Create a website using AdonERP's AI-based builder. Showcase your rooms, add photos, drag and drop elements, and optimize your SEO.
cards.listing: List your availabilities, room details, rates, and allow clients to make reservations online.

planningSection.title: Save time,
planningSection.description: Manage your planning, bookings, modifications, room upgrades, and additional services from one connected calendar.

operationsSection.title: Guest-centric
operationsSection.description: Run smooth check-in and check-out, add optional services like breakfast or activities, and collect guest information when required.

invoicingSection.title: Flexible
invoicingSection.description: Generate professional invoices in one click and accept multiple payment methods. Perfect for corporate clients and direct bookings.

featuresSection.title: All the features
featuresSection.subtitle: done right.
featuresSection.description: Tools to manage bookings, rooms, payments, planning, and guest services all in one place.

list.title: Online booking management
list.description: Accept reservations directly from your website with real-time availability.

list.title: Integrated sales and rental
list.description: Sell additional services and manage room rentals from one platform.

list.title: City tax
list.description: Automatically calculate and apply local city taxes to guest invoices.

list.title: Flexible invoicing
list.description: Generate professional invoices for individuals and corporate clients.

list.title: Streamlined planning
list.description: Manage room availability, check-ins, and check-outs from a single calendar.

list.title: Payment providers
list.description: Accept multiple payment methods including cards and digital wallets.

appsSection.title: One need, one app.
appsSection.description: Expand as you grow with connected apps for your guest house operation, booking management, and guest services.

testimonials.name: Elena Martinez
testimonials.content: AdonERP helped us achieve our goals while expanding, reducing costs and improving productivity, invoicing, and decision-making thanks to data availability.

testimonials.name: Thomas Anderson
testimonials.content: The online booking system and planning tools transformed our guest house. We now manage everything from one dashboard, and our guests love the seamless experience.

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million happy users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with AdonERP — the complete solution for guest houses and hospitality.

footerCta.title: Unleash
footerCta.subtitle: your growth potential
footerCta.description: Launch a guest house management workflow that helps you maximize bookings, streamline operations, and create memorable guest experiences.
